translations.en: Nystul
translations.zh: Nystul
translations.note: NPC name field — engine ID, 保 ASCII；對話內用『尼斯托』

translations.en: a concerned looking mage.
translations.zh: 一位面帶憂色的法師。

translations.en: "Hail to thee $G, and well met."
translations.zh: 「向汝致敬，$G，相見甚悅。」

translations.en: "'Twas I who learned of thy peril through my mystic arts, so that aid might be sent unto thee."
translations.zh: 「乃老朽藉神祕之術，得知汝有危難，故遣援手相助。」

translations.en: "Iolo, I saw that thou didst find a book."
translations.zh: 「尤洛，老朽見汝尋得一本書冊。」

translations.en: "Might I examine it?"
translations.zh: 「可容老朽一觀？」

translations.en: "I no longer have the book, milord." replies Iolo.
translations.zh: 「那本書已不在我身上，大人。」尤洛答道。
translations.note: Iolo 對 Nystul 稱『大人』

translations.en: "That is too bad. I had hoped thou might take it to Mariah and have her translate it."
translations.zh: 「可惜也。老朽本想請汝攜之去見瑪萊雅，由她譯解。」

translations.en: "Certainly, milord. Perhaps thou canst make better sense of it than I." says Iolo.
translations.zh: 「自然奉上，大人。或者汝能比我看出更多端倪。」尤洛說道。
translations.note: 避用『或許』(許 為 5C trail)

translations.en: "Strange..."
"This has a picture on its cover of a gargoyle standing with one foot on the chest of a slain human."
translations.zh: 「封面繪有一魔像，一足踏於被屠人類之胸膛。」

translations.en: "This is interesting."
translations.zh: 「頗為耐人尋味。」

translations.en: "It's written in a language I know not."
translations.zh: 「書中所用之語，老朽從未識得。」

translations.en: "Take it to Mariah at the Lycaeum, the finest scribe on the great Council of Wizards."
translations.zh: 「攜之去學苑尋瑪萊雅吧，她是法師議會中第一謄書之士。」
translations.note: Council of Wizards → 法師議會

translations.en: " She has studied many languages, and perhaps she can decipher this book for thee."
translations.zh: 「 她通曉諸種語言，或可為汝解讀此書。」

translations.en: "One more thing, Avatar..."
translations.zh: 「還有一事，聖者……」

translations.en: "I noticed that thou didst arrive through a red gateway."
translations.zh: 「老朽留意到，汝乃自一紅色之門而來。」

translations.en: "Dost thou have the stone that opened the gate?"
translations.zh: 「開啟那門之石，汝可持在身上？」

translations.en: yn
translations.zh: yn
translations.note: yes/no answer prefix — engine token，不譯

translations.en: "From whence could it have come? The gargoyles, perhaps?"
translations.zh: 「此物從何而來？莫非魔像族所為？」

translations.en: "Best ask Lord British about it."
translations.zh: 「此事最好請教不列顛王。」

translations.en: "I believe he has some knowledge of such items."
translations.zh: 「老朽相信陛下對此類之物頗有所知。」

translations.en: "Such items are quite rare."
translations.zh: 「此類之物，世間極為罕見。」

translations.en: "Indeed, the only one I have ever seen is that which Lord British himself possesses."
translations.zh: 「老朽生平所見，唯陛下手中所持之一枚而已。」

translations.en: "Hast thou gone to the Lycaeum and shown Mariah the book? 'Tis most important."
translations.zh: 「汝可曾至學苑，將書呈與瑪萊雅一觀？此事至為要緊。」

translations.en: "There is naught else I can help thee with at this time."
translations.zh: 「此時此刻，老朽再無他事可助汝。」

translator_notes: Nystul 學者口吻，自稱『老朽』稱玩家『汝』『聖者』。所有 26 條 zh_bytes ≤ 原文 len，repack 安全。已避開 5C trail 字（『許』改『或者』）。`yn` (offset 1016) 純引擎 token 不譯。
